Founder-led since October 2010 · Kathmandu & Melbourne

We’re not the cheapest engineering team. We’re the team you call when the cheapest one shipped something that’s losing you money.

Roshan Subedi Founder & MD · Kathmandu
Santosh Bhattarai APAC Partner · Melbourne

E Multitech Solution Pvt. Ltd. is a founder-led software engineering team based in Kathmandu, Nepal, with an Asia-Pacific marketing partner in Melbourne, Australia. Since October 2010 we’ve shipped 70+ production platforms for clients across 108 countries — from Nepal’s central bank to European enterprise procurement to service-booking marketplaces processing 500K+ daily transactions.

LEADERSHIP

The team is the founder, the partner, the engineers, the work.

Three named humans you can reach directly — the founder, the APAC partner, and the technical lead. No agency-shaped wall between you and the people who run the engagements.

Verified on LinkedIn

Founder & Managing Director

Roshan Subedi

Kathmandu, Nepal · UTC+5:45

“Built to last. Since day one.”

Roshan founded E Multitech Solution in Kathmandu in October 2010 and has led it continuously ever since — 15+ years of uninterrupted production delivery from a single in-house team, serving clients across 108 countries. He doesn’t believe in the cheapest path; he believes in the right one. When a low-cost build starts losing money, his team is the one that gets the call to fix it. His standard: compliance isn’t a checkbox, it’s a culture — which is why E Multitech is HIPAA-architected, GDPR compliant, and preparing for its SOC 2 Type 1 audit in 2026, not because regulators demand it, but because clients deserve it. The proof is live: Nepal’s central bank litigation system (five years in production), DiNePa (99.4% uptime), and Upkeep.pro (500,000+ daily bookings). Roshan doesn’t sell — he lets the work speak. “I don’t pitch. I prove.”

Connect on LinkedIn WhatsApp +977 9851038796
Verified on LinkedIn

APAC Marketing Partner

Santosh Bhattarai

Melbourne, Australia · UTC+10/+11

“Locally Accessible, Globally Capable”

Santosh is the face of E Multitech Solution across Asia-Pacific, based in Melbourne. His role is simple: turn skepticism into trust — one client outcome at a time. When competitors compete on price, he answers with evidence: a central bank system in its fifth year of production, a digital identity platform holding 99.4% uptime, and a maintenance platform architected for 500,000+ daily bookings. He knows the numbers because he’s lived them. Santosh doesn’t chase cheap engagements — he builds long-term partnerships with organizations that value compliance, stability, and proven delivery over short-term savings. In forums and client meetings alike, his message never changes: “We’re not for everyone. But if you need a system that won’t break, we’re for you.”

Connect on LinkedIn WhatsApp +61 406 806 984

Technical Lead · Senior Architect

Sujit Sah

Kathmandu, Nepal · UTC+5:45

“Code that stays. Systems that scale.”

Sujit is the senior architect behind E Multitech’s most demanding engagements, with 15+ years of production engineering experience. He doesn’t just write code — he designs systems that survive regulatory audits, scale to millions of users, and outlast the teams that built them. His work includes the architecture behind Upkeep.pro (500,000+ daily bookings), the backend of DiNePa (99.4% uptime), and the security framework of a central bank’s litigation system — every line written with HIPAA, GDPR, and the SOC 2 standards the team is now certifying against in mind. Sujit doesn’t do sales calls. He does 30-minute engineering calls — no slides, just a conversation about your architecture. If the fit is right, he’ll say yes. If not, he’ll tell you honestly.

Book a 30-minute engineering call

Below the leadership is an in-house engineering team in Kathmandu that bridges back-end, mobile, AI, SaaS, and DevOps practices. The same engineer who appears in discovery is the engineer who ships the code — not a bait-and-switch onto juniors after the contract signs. We don’t use subcontractors. We don’t outsource to a freelancer pool. The team is the team.

HOW WE’RE STRUCTURED

Six in-house engineering practices, one team.

Behind the two names above is a single in-house team in Kathmandu spanning six engineering practices. The same engineers carry work across disciplines — that’s how a 15-year team builds enough depth to ship 70+ production platforms across 7 service lines without ever subcontracting.

Back-end Engineering

Stack: Node.js + TypeScript, PHP 8 + Laravel 9, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, WebSocket.
Production reference: Nepal Rastra Bank litigation system (Laravel + MySQL, 5+ years live), DiNePa multi-tenant SaaS (Node + WebSocket, 99.4% uptime).

Mobile Engineering

Stack: Native iOS (Swift), Native Android (Kotlin), Flutter, React Native. Offline-first storage, biometric auth, OS-level push delivery, App Store + Play Store ops.
Production reference: Upkeep.pro (native iOS + Android, 500K+ daily appointments), AI Home Care Caregiver App (Flutter).

AI / ML Engineering

Stack: OpenAI / Anthropic (BAA where required), in-house fine-tuned models, vector DBs (pgvector, Pinecone, Weaviate), Whisper transcription, AWS Textract OCR, evaluation pipelines (Langfuse).
Production reference: 6 AI capabilities embedded in the AI Home Care SaaS (document intelligence, voice-to-text, risk detection, predictive ops, anomaly detection, summarisation).

SaaS Architecture

Specialty: Multi-tenant data isolation (schema-per-tenant or shared with RLS), subscription billing engines, real-time event processing (WebSocket), RBAC, multi-language / multi-currency.
Production reference: DiNePa (4 isolated portals, 80+ concurrent suppliers, 5+ years live).

DevOps & SRE

Stack: AWS, DigitalOcean, on-prem intranet (for central-bank engagements). Terraform, GitHub Actions, Docker, Kubernetes when justified, Prometheus + Grafana, PagerDuty, runbook-driven on-call.
Production reference: DiNePa 99.4% uptime over 5+ years; NRB isolated intranet deployment.

Quality Engineering & Compliance

Practice: Test automation (Jest, Vitest, Playwright, Cypress), CI-blocking suites, real-device mobile testing, compliance audit prep (HIPAA, EVV, GDPR, SOC 2-aligned), security review on every release.
Production reference: Central-bank-grade audit readiness on NRB; healthcare-grade compliance design on the AI Home Care SaaS.

Continuously in production since October 2010 · Registered in Nepal

15 +

Years of production software engineering.

Continuously shipping since the year iPhone 4 launched and SaaS was still called “hosted apps.”

In an industry where most agencies are under five years old and the median client engagement ends in year two, we’ve held a continuous production track record since October 2010. That tenure is the reason Nepal’s central bank litigation system is still live in year five, DiNePa holds 99.4% uptime, and Upkeep.pro can scale to 500,000+ daily bookings on the architecture we shipped. Fifteen years isn’t a slogan — it’s the entire reason this site has the case studies it does.

OUR STORY

Fifteen years of production software, in five chapters.

  1. 2010

    Founded in Kathmandu

    Roshan Subedi founds E Multitech Solution Pvt. Ltd. with a single thesis: regulated and operations-critical software should be engineered, not assembled. First production deployment ships before the App Store has a search bar.

  2. 2010–2018

    The auction software era

    Built six auction formats (penny, lowest unique bid, highest unique bid, price reveal, Dutch, B2B reverse) deployed for operators across the US, UK, EU, Singapore, Australia, and Asia. The transactional-software depth that later became the foundation for SaaS and marketplace work.

  3. 2019–2020

    Enterprise & central-bank-grade

    DiNePa goes live: multi-tenant real-time digital negotiation SaaS for European enterprise procurement, still at 99.4% uptime in year five. Nepal Rastra Bank litigation system goes live on isolated intranet — central-bank-grade compliance, still running in year five with no rebuild.

  4. 2021–2024

    Marketplace scale + AI integration

    Upkeep.pro grows to 500,000+ daily appointments on the native iOS + Android + web marketplace we shipped. Cross-vertical engineering proves the model: same team, banking + procurement + marketplace + mobile.

  5. 2025–2026

    Healthcare moat + AI-engineered platforms

    AI-powered adult home care SaaS in production-ready development for a US healthcare operator under NDA: HIPAA-architected 3-module ecosystem with 6 embedded AI capabilities. Capterra rating reaches 4.8★ across 25 verified third-party client reviews.

The team that wins the demo is rarely the team whose code is still running in year five. We optimised for year five from the day we registered the company in October 2010 — and the four case studies above are the result. That’s the entire pitch.

Roshan Subedi

Founder & MD · LinkedIn

WHAT WE SHIP

Four production deployments that define the standard.

Every number on this page is publicly verifiable — from a case study, a client website, or a third-party review platform.

Nepal Rastra Bank — Central Bank

Live for 5+ years. Litigation Management System on PHP 8 + Laravel 9 + MySQL 8, isolated intranet deployment. 70% faster case resolution, 5× operational capacity expansion, 100% audit-readiness, bilingual English/Nepali Unicode.
Read full case study →

DiNePa — EU Procurement SaaS

Live for 5+ years. Multi-tenant real-time digital negotiation SaaS supporting reverse, forward and hybrid bidding for European enterprise procurement. 99.4% uptime, sub-500ms bid recalculation, 80 concurrent suppliers per tender, four isolated portals.
Read full case study →

Upkeep.pro — Service-Booking Marketplace

Live: Native iOS, Android & web. Service-booking marketplace connecting consumers with beauty & home-service providers. 500,000+ daily appointments booked, 10,000+ professionals worldwide, 37% reported provider income growth.
Read full case study →

AI-Powered Home Care SaaS

Status: In production-ready development for a US healthcare operator under NDA. 3-module HIPAA-aligned multi-tenant SaaS with AI document intelligence, voice-to-text caregiver notes, predictive scheduling, and clinical risk-flag detection.
Read full case study →

WHAT WE BELIEVE

Six principles that decide whether we work on a project.

  1. 01

    Engineer for year five, not the demo day

    The system that wins the demo is rarely the system that survives year-five OS upgrades, regulatory audits, and 10× user growth. We architect for the second year of production. Our reference deployments are all 5+ years live for a reason.

  2. 02

    The team is the team

    No subcontractors. No hidden freelancer pool. No bait-and-switch onto juniors after the contract signs. The engineer you meet in discovery is the engineer who ships your code. This is also why we’re not the cheapest — in-house teams cost more than contractor arbitrage.

  3. 03

    Compliance is architecture, not policy

    HIPAA, EVV, central-bank audit, GDPR, SOC 2 — the difference between a vendor that “follows” these and one that ships them is whether compliance shaped the data model and deployment topology, or got bolted on after the build. We always start with the regulatory environment. Always.

  4. 04

    Numbers we say have to be defensible

    Every number on this site is either publicly verifiable (Capterra, upkeep.pro), sourced from a published case study (NRB, DiNePa), or qualitatively defensible (“in-house team,” not a count). We turned down inflated stats from our previous about page because they couldn’t survive a buyer’s due diligence.

  5. 05

    The founder is on the WhatsApp line

    Roshan personally responds to inbound architecture-audit and takeover requests. The phone number at the bottom of every page is real. If your previous vendor went silent, the call escalation path here is one step, not five.

  6. 06

    We say no when we’re not the right fit

    If your project is better served by a specialist agency, a no-code tool, or a different price tier, we tell you in the discovery call. We’d rather refer the work than take a fit-mismatch and produce a year-three rebuild for someone else.

WHERE WE WORK

Two timezones. One in-house team. One marketing partner in Melbourne.

Kathmandu (HQ)

UTC+5:45 · In-house engineering

The engineering team lives here. Back-end, mobile, AI, SaaS, and DevOps practices under one roof in Lalitpur. Registered as E Multitech Solution Pvt. Ltd. in Nepal since October 2010. Most production work, code review, and architecture decisions happen on this timezone. Direct line: +977 9851038796 (Roshan, Founder & MD).

Melbourne (Asia-Pacific)

UTC+10/+11 · Marketing partner: Santosh Bhattarai

Real Australia-based representation through Santosh Bhattarai, our Melbourne marketing partner who covers Asia-Pacific client relations and regional sales. For Australian and APAC clients, you’ll often speak to Santosh first — with engineering follow-up from the Kathmandu team. Local time-zone coverage, regional context, no international-number friction for routine project communications. Direct line: +61 406 806 984 (WhatsApp + call).

Clients across 108 countries

Globally distributed · English-speaking

Capterra-verified clients across real estate, automotive, sports, non-profit, marketing, and auction industries. Production deployments in the US, UK, EU, Australia, Singapore, Malaysia, India, Spain, Philippines, Nepal, Canada, and more. The 70+ portfolio reaches further than the head count suggests.

What it’s like to work with us.

Two of many — read the rest on our client stories page, or verify them independently on Capterra.

QUESTIONS

About E Multitech Solution, frequently asked.

The questions prospective clients ask us most — answered straight.

What does E Multitech Solution do?

We’re a founder-led software engineering company, building production software since October 2010. Our work spans custom software, SaaS product development, AI/ML, mobile apps, DevOps & cloud, and end-to-end product engineering — 70+ platforms shipped for clients across 108 countries.

Where is E Multitech Solution based?

Our engineering team is in-house in Kathmandu, Nepal, registered as E Multitech Solution Pvt. Ltd. since October 2010. We also have an Asia-Pacific marketing partner, Santosh Bhattarai, based in Melbourne, Australia, for local APAC client coverage.

How long have you been in business?

Since October 2010 — over 15 years of continuous production software delivery. That tenure is the reason our reference deployments (Nepal Rastra Bank, DiNePa) are still live in year five.

Who are some of your clients?

Nepal Rastra Bank (the country’s central bank), DiNePa (European enterprise procurement SaaS), Upkeep.pro (a service-booking marketplace at 500K+ daily bookings), and auction operators across the US, UK, EU, Singapore, and Australia. Our auction platform holds a 4.8★ rating on Capterra across 25 verified reviews.

Do you work with international clients?

Yes. We’ve served clients in 108 countries, with active production deployments across the US, UK, EU, Australia, and Asia. All work is in English, and our two-timezone setup (Kathmandu + Melbourne) gives most regions same-business-day coverage.

Do you use subcontractors or freelancers?

No. Every line of your code is written by our in-house team in Kathmandu — no hidden freelancer pool, no offshore handoff, no quality roulette between sprints.

Will I work with the same engineers throughout the project?

Yes. The engineer you meet in discovery is the engineer who ships your code — no bait-and-switch onto juniors after the contract signs. The founder, Roshan Subedi, personally reviews every architecture engagement.

Do you sign NDAs and BAAs?

An NDA is available on request before discovery. For HIPAA healthcare engagements, a Business Associate Agreement (BAA) is available. Standard MSA and SOW templates can be shared before our first call.

Are you HIPAA and GDPR compliant?

We architect for compliance from day one rather than bolting it on. Our builds are HIPAA-architected and GDPR-aligned, with central-bank-grade audit experience (Nepal Rastra Bank). SOC 2 is on our 2026 roadmap. See our Security & Compliance page for detail.

What are your engagement and pricing models?

Fixed-price discovery sprint, fixed-price MVP build, and time-and-materials retainer post-launch — pick the model that fits your stage. We send a ballpark range on the first call and a firm quote after a 30-minute discovery session. No hidden fees, no surprise change orders.

How quickly will you respond if I get in touch?

Within 48 hours — and your first call is with an engineer, not a sales rep. No call-center, no qualification quiz, no demo deck before a real conversation.

Can you take over an existing or troubled project?

Yes — it’s one of our most common engagements. We audit the existing codebase, write a remediation plan, and either keep it running or rebuild the problem pieces. We’ve done this for clients whose original team disappeared or whose platform stopped scaling.
